text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a day out, Tokai Teio and I return to the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer, I think I finally figured it out.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You know, the answer to Prez's assignment about
what you mean to me.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So I'm thinking it's about time I went and told her
what I've come up with.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! ♪ Thanks, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She rushes off feeling confident. Curious to see
how it goes, I wait by the student council office.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Nooooo!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer? ...Were you waiting here for me?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...She rejected my answer.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I told her you're someone who praises me when I
do good and stops me when I get out of line. But
then...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Think carefully about what you just told me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Praise and admonishment are not difficult things
to come by; a maid or butler could provide you
with the same.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh! When you put it like that...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Can that truly be the extent of your trainer's role?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Why, of all people, did you pick him to guide you
on your path?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Why, of all people, did you pick her to guide you
on your path?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Well, I...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That hesitation right there is why I cannot accept
your answer. You must try again.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...That's the short of it. What was I supposed to
say?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What would you say? Why did you choose me out of all the other racers?
choice_data_list: I like the way you run.
I intend on keeping my promises.
Probably the same reason you chose me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first time I saw Tokai Teio run with such
freedom and power, I couldn't take my eyes off
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I open up to her about how, from that moment
on, I was captivated by her.
choice_data_list:
I wanted to watch that shimmering soul race
over and over again.

I wanted to watch that shimmering soul race
over and over again.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I... I want to show you that, too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I want to get strong enough to capture everyone's
hearts!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing that powerful glimmer in her eyes, I know
there's no other racer I'd rather train.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...Well done. You two make for a surprisingly
good combination.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: P-Prez! You heard us?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Heh. You were right outside my door. I could hear
everything from inside.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I take back my earlier statement. The assignment
is complete.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume and their trainers are inextricably
linked. They both grow through mutual respect,
trust, and learning from one another.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I hope to see great things from both of you in the
future.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'm gonna work hard... right alongside my
trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This assignment has been a valuable experience
for both Teio and myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When Teio "declared war" on Symboli Rudolf, I
made her a promise that we would work hard
together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And when we were at the amusement park, I made
a promise about the future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell Teio that whether as her trainer or her
friend, I will always honor my promises to her.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I... I want to honor my promises to you, too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna surpass Prez, and you'll be there to
shower me with praise!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing that powerful glimmer in her eyes, I know
there's no other racer I'd rather train.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...Well done. It seems my meddling was
uncalled-for after all.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: P-Prez! You heard us?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Heh. You were right outside my door. I could hear
everything from inside.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You know, perhaps I've been a little too soft on
you.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Wha? Nooo, feel free to spoil me all you want! ♪

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Do not try me. In any case, I'll consider your
assignment complete.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume and their trainers are inextricably
linked. They both grow through mutual respect,
trust, and learning from one another.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I hope to see great things from both of you in the
future.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'm gonna work hard... right alongside my
trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This assignment has been a valuable experience
for both Teio and myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I chose Teio because, well, she's Teio. I wanted to train her. When I tell her as much, she gasps.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Because I'm... me. Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Whether I'm happy because I won, or frustrated
because I'm worried...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You're always there to lend me an ear.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I've gotten to where I am today because it's been you by my side.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I don't want anyone else either! I just want you!
My trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I want you to praise me and to scold me... and to
write the legend of the invincible Teio together
with me!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You're the only trainer in the whole wide world
for me!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. I suppose that answer is worth a passing
grade. The assignment is over.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: P-Prez! You heard us?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Heh. You were right outside my door. I could hear
everything from inside.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume and their trainers are inextricably
linked. They both grow through mutual respect,
trust, and learning from one another.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I hope to see great things from both of you in the
future.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'm gonna work hard... right alongside my
trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This assignment has been a valuable experience
for both Teio and myself.
